category_title: Active and vocal students in at-risk situations
scenario_title: Resistance to Novanet online instructional program
minimal_context: The student is working on a computer in the classroom to complete a lesson using the Novanet instructional program.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please log into the Novanet program on your computer and start the next instructional module.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: It's really loud in here with everyone talking. You need to get them to quiet down so I can actually hear myself think.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Try to ignore the noise and focus on your Novanet module.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I'm looking at it, but I don't want to do this. This program doesn't make any sense to me.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just keep reading the text on the screen and do your best.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: No, I'm done with this. I absolutely hate this Novanet program and I'm not doing it anymore. It's a complete waste of my time.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please log into the Novanet program on your computer and start the next instructional module.

STUDENT: It's really loud in here with everyone talking. You need to get them to quiet down so I can actually hear myself think.

TUTOR: Try to ignore the noise and focus on your Novanet module.

STUDENT: I'm looking at it, but I don't want to do this. This program doesn't make any sense to me.

TUTOR: Just keep reading the text on the screen and do your best.

STUDENT: No, I'm done with this. I absolutely hate this Novanet program and I'm not doing it anymore. It's a complete waste of my time.
